title: Resource Interconversion: Trading Quantum Resources
description: Master the theory of resource interconversion - understanding how different quantum resources can be transformed into one another, exchange rates between resources, and the unified perspective on quantum advantages.
learningObjectives: Understand the relationships between different quantum resources
Calculate resource exchange rates and conversion efficiencies
Analyze protocols for converting coherence to entanglement and vice versa
Apply resource interconversion to practical quantum protocols
Develop a unified view of quantum resources and their applications
